[BRANCH] main
[TASK] Pro milestone — WebSocket NCP migration complete
[STATUS] done

[DONE] Lite v0.1.0-alpha.1 released to nuget.org (5 packages)
[DONE] GitHub Release v0.1.0-alpha.1 created
[DONE] .mcp.json added for Claude Code integration
[DONE] nuget.config: Banyan.* routed to nuget.org, Nexus for OLS.Root.* only
[DONE] Pro WebSocket NCP transport migrated to banyan-brain-pro
[DONE] Lite reverted clean — no Pro traces remain (8 Node tests passing)
[DONE] Pro repo: Banyan.Node.Pro library + 7/7 tests passing
[DONE] Pro nuget.config uses local-banyan feed for Banyan.Node/Web/Identity packs
[DONE] Banyan.Node / Banyan.Web / Banyan.Identity packed to artifacts/packages/ for Pro use

[NEXT] Tag Lite feat/pro-websocket-ncp branch as done; delete or squash
[NEXT] Push Pro feat branch → PR in innolotus/banyan-brain-pro
[NEXT] Update Pro README.md with quickstart + doc table

[FILES]
[BLOCK]
